# openai_model_response (Resource)

The model_response resource allows you to generate text completions from OpenAI models.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_model_response" "logo_prompt" {
  model = "gpt-4.1-2025-04-14"
  input = <<EOF
  Create a prompt to generate super fun logo for a new Terraform OpenAI provider.
  EOF
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `frequency_penalty` (Number)
- `include` (List of String)
- `input` (String) The input text to the model.
- `instructions` (String)
- `max_output_tokens` (Number)
- `model` (String) ID of the model to use.
- `presence_penalty` (Number)
- `stop_sequences` (List of String)
- `temperature` (Number)
- `top_k` (Number)
- `top_p` (Number)
- `user` (String)

### Read-Only

- `content` (String) The generated content.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
